name: Webeyez
excerpt: Webeyez is a real-time eCommerce analytics platform that detects, prioritizes, and resolves the friction quietly costing conversion. AI-driven funnel analysis, session replay, and revenue-quantified alerts that bridge marketing and development.
content:
Webeyez is a real-time analytics and monitoring platform that empowers eCommerce companies to detect, prioritize, and resolve customer-experience roadblocks. AI-driven funnel analysis, session replay, and revenue-quantified alerts turn silent conversion friction into ranked, dev-ready fixes, and bridge the gap between marketing and development. More than 1,000 brands use it to protect revenue across the checkout path.

Key benefits of the offering:

  • Real-time friction detection: AI pinpoints exactly where shoppers hit technical and UX issues in the live funnel, in time to act on them.
  • Revenue-quantified prioritization: Every issue carries the revenue at risk attached, so teams fix what costs the most first.
  • Session replay and visual diagnostics: See the funnel through the customer's eyes and hand development a reproducible case, not a guess.
  • Marketing and development, bridged: One shared view of what is breaking and what it costs, so both teams work the same priority list.

Why partner together?

Webeyez instruments what happens once a shopper is on the site. Content Cucumber instruments whether buyers and AI engines find and trust the brand before they ever arrive. The two reads do not overlap, and a client needs both. Together they form one combined full-funnel audit. Content Cucumber delivers the discoverability, schema, content, and AI-citation read, Webeyez delivers the on-site friction and revenue-at-risk read, and the client gets a single picture instead of two partial ones. Co-sell is the lead shape, with reciprocal referral as the low-friction default through the Webeyez partner program.
